revisions.what_changed: Workshopped M11 from 14 Danilo tabs to 8 production files. Heavy research (FTC compliance 2026, ClickBank VSL benchmarks, Agora direct response). 6-round expert dialogue (D2C Creative Director, Performance Media Buyer, FTC Compliance Attorney) produced 15 upgrades. Quality 9.2/10.
revisions.quality_rationale: FTC compliance rigorously documented (fictional testimonials flagged, substantiation gaps explicit). Testing protocol statistically rigorous (kill criteria, CPA creep thresholds, platform allocation). Financial model realistic (10-20% winner rate). Dialogue upgraded 15 weak points. Only gap: bioavailability claims need RCT OR structure/function pivot.

sheets.title: VSL Script
sheets.note: Existing 4-min IonWave script graded with compliance flags (5/10 as-is)

key_blockers: REC-001 UNRESOLVED: Margin dispute (67% Bootstrap vs 40% Danilo) affects break-even CPA calculation
Pre-launch: Cannot test FTC-compliant testimonials until Month 2+ (need real customers)
Bioavailability substantiation: '98% identical to blood plasma' claim requires RCT OR pivot to structure/function language
next_action: Post-launch Month 1: Test 5 hook variants on ANG-01 (marine plasma mechanism) with $1,200 budget. Collect real customer testimonials for Month 2 VSL refresh.

intelligence_gaps.gap: Winning hook type for marine plasma
intelligence_gaps.upgrade: Test 10 hooks (2 per type), identify best-performing type

intelligence_gaps.gap: Platform-specific CPA (Meta vs TikTok vs YouTube)
intelligence_gaps.upgrade: Test same VSL on 3 platforms with $500 each

intelligence_gaps.gap: VSL fatigue timeline for marine plasma
intelligence_gaps.upgrade: Track CTR decay over first 3 winning VSLs
Commission RCT OR soften all claims to structure/function
